note_evidence: hospitalization for sepsis complicated by septic shock and acute respiratory distress syndrome
rationale: Sepsis/septic shock/ARDS and recovery documented, but mechanical ventilation not mentioned.

note_evidence: remains exertionally limited on hills and stairs. He denies fever, chills, night sweats, cough, chest pain, dyspnea at rest
rationale: Exertional limitation on hills/stairs and no rest dyspnea documented.

note_evidence: steadily improving stamina since discharge: he walks daily and tolerates level ground well but remains exertionally limited on hills and stairs
rationale: Walks daily with reduced exertional tolerance documented.

note_evidence: He denies fever, chills, night sweats
rationale: Infection symptoms denied.

note_evidence: denies ... chest pain, dyspnea at rest
rationale: Chest pain and rest dyspnea denied.

note_evidence: denies fever, chills, night sweats, cough
rationale: Cough denied.

note_evidence: he denies dizziness or pallor and notes his family feels his color has returned
rationale: Dizziness and palpitations denied and color returned, though exact month not stated.

note_evidence: Known anemia is clinically asymptomatic today ... Continue longitudinal monitoring of anemia
rationale: Known anemia, asymptomatic, being monitored.

note_evidence: He rates pain 1/10, attributed to intermittent low back ache with prolonged sitting
rationale: Low back pain 1/10 with prolonged sitting documented.

note_evidence: he lost his logistics job in February after his prolonged medical leave and is unemployed for the first time in his adult life
rationale: Unemployment since February, first time in adult life documented.

note_evidence: He describes markedly reduced social contact since the illness
rationale: Social isolation documented, exact frequency omitted but captured.

note_evidence: He lives with five family members in a three-bedroom rental with delayed landlord maintenance and describes the housing situation as unsatisfactory and crowded
rationale: Overcrowding, six occupants, disrepair documented.

note_evidence: household finances remain stable on his wife's income
rationale: Income adequacy and wife's support documented, but private insurance not mentioned.

note_evidence: Community resource sheet provided (employment center, tenant advocacy line)
rationale: Resource sheet with employment center and tenant advocacy documented.

note_evidence: Assessment of health and social care needs completed today
rationale: Assessment documented.

note_evidence: Depression screening negative (PHQ-2 score 1)
rationale: PHQ-2 score 1, low risk documented.

note_evidence: denies any drug use ... DAST-10 total score 0
rationale: Drug use denied, DAST-10 score 0.

note_evidence: He has never smoked, drinks alcohol rarely
rationale: Never smoker and minimal alcohol documented.

note_evidence: drug abuse screening negative (DAST-10 score 0) ... Substance use assessment unremarkable
rationale: Substance use/drug abuse screening performed.

note_evidence: He takes no daily prescription medications ... residual hospital entries removed
rationale: No daily prescriptions; hospital meds removed.

note_evidence: No known allergies.
rationale: No known allergies documented.

note_evidence: Medication reconciliation completed; residual hospital entries removed
rationale: Med reconciliation removing hospital entries documented.

note_evidence: BP 107/69 mmHg
rationale: BP documented.

note_evidence: HR 63/min
rationale: HR documented.

note_evidence: RR 15/min
rationale: RR documented.

note_evidence: Lungs clear bilaterally without increased work of breathing. Heart regular rate and rhythm. ... No lower extremity edema.
rationale: Clear lungs, regular heart, no edema documented.

note_evidence: weight 84.4 kg, height 166.8 cm, BMI 30.34 kg/m2
rationale: Weight, height, BMI documented.

note_evidence: Hemoglobin A1c 5.99% ... remains in the prediabetic range
rationale: HbA1c 5.99% consistent with prediabetes.

note_evidence: normal fasting glucose of 86.7 mg/dL
rationale: Glucose 86.7 normal documented.

note_evidence: sodium 139.13 mmol/L, potassium 4.89 mmol/L, chloride 104.04 mmol/L, total CO2 28.05 mmol/L
rationale: Electrolytes documented.

note_evidence: Renal indices reassuring after septic shock (creatinine 1.22 mg/dL) ... BUN 13.78 mg/dL
rationale: Creatinine and BUN documented, reassuring.

note_evidence: goal of 5–7% weight loss and progressive daily walking
rationale: Weight loss goal and daily walking counseling documented.

note_evidence: progressive daily walking ... graded aerobic activity as tolerated
rationale: Daily walking counseling documented, exact duration omitted.

note_evidence: Influenza vaccine (split virus, trivalent, preservative-free) administered today
rationale: Vaccine type documented, but injection site (left arm) not noted.
No mention of prior vaccine reaction history.

note_evidence: Repeat A1c at follow-up in approximately 6 months
rationale: A1c recheck in ~6 months documented.

note_evidence: Follow-up visit in approximately 6 months ... Continue longitudinal monitoring of anemia ... patient agreed to report mood changes
rationale: Follow-up plus anemia/mood monitoring documented.

note_evidence: patient agreed to report mood changes
rationale: Advised to report mood changes.
Note does not attribute fatigue to combined causes with workup plan.

note_evidence: Medication review due ... Medication reconciliation completed
rationale: Med review flagged due and resolved.

note_evidence: calcium 9.98 mg/dL
rationale: Calcium documented.

note_evidence: PRAPARE completed: household of 6; reported annual family income $198,810
rationale: PRAPARE completed, but safety/partner fear/stress details not documented.
